# ManagedApp

**Structure**

A representation of a managed app.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ManagedApp
```

## Overview

[doc://com.apple.ManagedAppDistribution/documentation/ManagedAppDistribution/ManagedApp] represents a managed app that the framework can install. Use an instance of this object to obtain information about the app.

## Obtaining general information

- **name**: The app’s localized name.
- **subtitle**: The app’s localized subtitle.
- **description**: The app’s localized description.
- **fileSize**: The size of the app in bytes.
- **iconURL(fitting:)**: A URL for the icon of the app.
- **screenshotURLs(fitting:)**: An array of the app’s screenshot URLs.

## Obtaining platform and requirement information

- **platform**: The platform of the app.
- **requirements**: The app’s localized operating system compatibility requirements.
- **ManagedApp.Platform**: The supported platform for the app.

## Obtaining supported languages

- **languages**: The app’s supported languages.
- **metadataLanguage**: The language of the localized properties of this managed app.

## Obtaining seller information

- **seller**: The app’s localized seller.
- **developerWebsite**: The app’s developer website URL.

## Obtaining rating information

- **genres**: The app’s localized genres.
- **contentRating**: The app’s content age rating.

## Obtaining privacy and copyright information

- **privacyPolicy**: The app’s privacy policy URL.
- **copyright**: The app’s copyright information.
- **licenseAgreement**: The app’s license agreement URL.

## Obtaining version information

- **version**: The app’s version information.
- **releaseNotes**: The app’s localized developer release notes.
- **releaseDate**: The app’s release date.

## Essentials

- **Fetching and displaying managed apps**: Provide a consistent app presentation when displaying managed apps.
- **ManagedAppLibrary**: A representation of a library of managed apps.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Equatable
- Escapable
- Hashable
- Identifiable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
